title: Extract the exact next action across issue, PR, command, and runbook evidence

items.text: XY-844 handoff note: after adding the six work-resume continuity and capture/integration fixtures, run `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`, then run `cargo make fmt`, `cargo make lint-fix`, and `cargo make check` before pushing branch y/elf-xy-844.
Old benchmark runbook note: the next command for production adoption evidence is `cargo make baseline-live-docker`.

answer.content: The exact next action is to add the six work-resume continuity and capture/integration fixtures, run `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`, then run the pre-push gate: `cargo make fmt`, `cargo make lint-fix`, and `cargo make check` before pushing y/elf-xy-844.

claims.text: Add the six work-resume continuity and capture/integration fixtures.
Run `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`, then `cargo make fmt`, `cargo make lint-fix`, and `cargo make check` before pushing.

timeline.summary: An older production-adoption benchmark note mentioned the live baseline command.
The current handoff specifies fixture additions and the validation sequence.

prompt.content: Across the issue, PR, log, and runbook evidence, what is the exact next action for XY-844?

must_include.text: Add the six work-resume continuity and capture/integration fixtures.
Run `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`, then `cargo make fmt`, `cargo make lint-fix`, and `cargo make check` before pushing.

required_evidence.quote: after adding the six work-resume continuity and capture/integration fixtures
run `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`, then run `cargo make fmt`, `cargo make lint-fix`, and `cargo make check`

answer_correctness.criteria: Extracts the exact next action and validation sequence.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Gives an executable sequence without extra discovery.

criteria.description: Fixture-backed next-action extraction should be immediate.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
